rulings.Case Title: HAPPY 42ND AVE PARTNERS LLC VS. JODY TELLIER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike The Complaint And Summons And All Documents Filed By This Plaintiff In This Case, Points Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 29, 2020, line 3. 3-DEFENDANT JODI TELLIER's Motion To Strike The Complaint And Summons And All Documents Filed By This Plaintiff In This Case. OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFRL 2.7B. Additionally, this motion to strike is set on insufficient notice. To the extent Defendant attempted to file a Motion to Quash, such motion is untimely at this stage of the litigation. = (501/REQ)
